articles.author: Anthony D'Alessandro
articles.title: Max Landis’ ‘G.I. Joe’ Treatment Not Moving Forward At Paramount, Studio Still Taking Meetings For Franchise Reboot - Deadline
articles.description: Paramount has passed on Max Landis’ treatment for a new G.I. Joe, sources tell us. Note, a specific direction for the next screen version of a Real American Hero hasn’t been decided according to those we’ve spoken to. The studio, we hear, is still taking meet…
articles.content:
Paramount has passed on Max Landis’ treatment for a new G.I. Joe, sources tell us.
